nasb.text: so that no one would be disturbed by these afflictions; for you yourselves know that we have been destined for this.

esv.text: that no one be moved by these afflictions. For you yourselves know that we are destined for this.

cnv.text: 免得有人在各樣的患難中動搖了。你們自己知道，我們受患難原是命定的。

ccb.text: 免得有人因遭受这些患难而动摇，因为你们知道我们必遭受患难。

csbs.text: 免得有人在这些患难中动摇。因为你们自己知道，我们要受患难是注定的。
